title: Night Vision Carrot
description: Add a night vision carrot that helps see clearly in the night, and other useful tools
body:
![with maid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8978dc965984bb0b026be16f262997829b5704a0.png)

## Description

Jean mod  is a  mod that adds a lot of small features to the game for your better play. It add some small fix fo vanilla Minecraft, such as compatiblilty of mending and infinity on bow, pigs have more babies,and many others.Details are below.

## List of features

- Show equipment and tool durability number.
- Add hurt sound when player get hurt.
- Add an inventory to villages to show their inventory, you can also see village's inventory through jade.
- Add an inventory to iron golem, you can put iron ingot so it will heal itself when low health.
- Add a night vision carrot so you can freely see everything in the night.
- Add some entities sush as maid and elf, they are your family!
- When game started, there will be a tooltip showing you how long it takes to start
